chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Revision Application No.S-01 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, advocate for Applicant. Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani Assistant PG. -------- The instant Revision Application has been filed against the Order dated 11.12.2024 passed in Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.32 of 2024, whereby Application filed by Applicant Shuaib Ahmed son of Irshad Ahmed for seeking release of case property viz. Belarus Tractor bearing registration No.FB-5632, Chassis No.05766527, Engine No.978408 model 2017, retained by the police of PS Kario Ganhwar in Crime No.153 of 2024, registered under section, 320, 322, 279, 427 PPC. 2. Learned Counsel for the Applicant states that based upon extraneous factors, as recorded at paragraph 6 of the impugned Order, the Application under Section 516-A Cr.P.C. was rejected by the learned Sessions Judge Badin. Learned Counsel also draws attention to the provisions of Section 516-A Cr.P.C and stated that the Applicant is the owner of the subject tractor and he is ready to undertake not to hand over the said property to any person who does not have a valid driving license, and he would further produce the said property, as and when required by the Court in the subject Crime No.153 of 2024. 3. In view of the above, the Order impugned is set-aside and the custody of the subject tractor is allowed to be handed over to the Applicant, subject to proper verification regarding his ownership, and the undertaking to be taken from the Applicant to the above effect; and also subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1000000/- (Ten Lac) and PR Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of learned Trial Court. the Applicant shall produce the said case property as and when required by the learned Trial Court in Crime No.153 of 2024.

Learned Counsel also draws attention to the provisions of Section 516-A Cr.P.C and stated that the Applicant is the owner of the subject tractor and he is ready to undertake not to hand over the said property to any person who does not have a valid driving license, and he would further produce the said property, as and when required by the Court in the subject Crime No.153 of 2024. 3. In view of the above, the Order impugned is set-aside and the custody of the subject tractor is allowed to be handed over to the Applicant, subject to proper verification regarding his ownership, and the undertaking to be taken from the Applicant to the above effect; and also subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1000000/- (Ten Lac) and PR Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of learned Trial Court. the Applicant shall produce the said case property as and when required by the learned Trial Court in Crime No.153 of 2024. JUDGE Ali Haider
